title: AmbientEvents
description:
AmbientEvents Plugin
Adds subtle, randomized horror-themed effects like flickering torches, cave footsteps, whispers, and sudden fog to create an eerie atmosphere around players without commands or config.
body:
🌌 Ambient Events – Subtle, atmospheric world events for Minecraft 1.21.4

Ambient Events is a server-side mod that adds immersive, randomly occurring events to your Minecraft world—ranging from unsettling sounds to eerie environmental effects. Designed for survival gameplay, horror maps, ARGs, and immersive RPG servers, it brings your world to life with dynamic, lore-friendly occurrences that feel natural yet mysterious.

🔮 Key Features
✨ Natural World Events

Cold breezes, fog, flickering torches, falling leaves, distant whispers, and ghostly footsteps.

Optional sound cues and visual hints that blend into gameplay.

🎯 Time- or Trigger-Based Activation

Events can happen over time or based on specific conditions:

Mining for too long

Killing many mobs

Entering a forest at night

🌍 Local or Global Impact

Some events affect one player (e.g. whispers).

Others are server-wide (e.g. “Red Moon” nights, foggy anomalies).

🛠 Configurable & Modular

Control frequency, intensity, and which types of events are active.

Choose between purely cosmetic or gameplay-affecting effects.

🧩 ARG & Story Support

Insert cryptic messages, signs, strange mob behavior, or hidden patterns to build long-term mystery and player speculation.

⚙️ Performance Optimized

Low-impact logic using asynchronous processing where possible.

💭 Why Choose Ambient Events?
Minecraft worlds can feel static over time. Ambient Events adds just enough mystery to make every play session feel dynamic, alive, and unpredictable. Whether you're running a horror server, crafting immersive quests, or just want your world to “breathe,” this mod gives you the tools to build unforgettable moments.
